description: A range action interface specifying an action on one or several Injections (Generator and/or Loads)

id.description: The unique identifier of the remedial action

name.description: The name of the remedial action

operator.description: The operator of the remedial action

groupId.description: The group identifier of the range action. All range actions which share the same group identifier should have the same setpoint.

speed.description: The time it takes to trigger the remedial action

networkElementIdsAndKeys.description: A map of network element identifiers and their distribution keys

ranges.description: The list of operational ranges delimiting the bounds of the range action, if several are defined the RAO will only consider their intersection

onInstantUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined at a given instant

onContingencyStateUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined on a given state

onConstraintUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined at a given instant for a given CNEC

onFlowConstraintInCountryUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined on a given country, triggered when a flow CNEC of that country is constrained
